title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro-Sciences, Bangalore Act, 2012. (2) It shall come into force on such date 1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1 29th November, 2013, vide notification No S.O. 3534(E), dated 29th November, 2013 see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
